result: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make every conscious being able to truly feel the inner reality of others—not just understand it intellectually, but experience a direct, undeniable empathic link. No ideology, no tribalism, no act of cruelty could survive that. We’d still have conflict, but we’d never be able to ignore the cost of our choices.
